title: OSL Group Named to CNBC’s "World’s Top Fintech Companies" for the Second Consecutive Year
description: OSL Group announced its inclusion in CNBC's "World’s Top Fintech Companies 2026" list, marking the second consecutive year OSL has received this accolade.

title: OSL集團連續兩年榮登CNBC《全球頂尖金融科技公司》榜單
description: 香港, July 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- 全球穩定幣支付及交易平台OSL集團（HKEX：863）（下稱OSL）今日宣布，公司再度入選由財經媒體CNBC與全球研究機構Statista聯合發布的《2026全球頂尖金融科技公司》榜單（World’s Top Fintech Companies 2026）。

title: Increase of the authorised capital of AB Novaturas is completed, new Articles of Association are registered, new shares are registered and introduced to trading on AB Nasdaq Vilnius
description: AB Novaturas (hereinafter - the Company) announces that on 21 July 2026, (i) the Company’s amended Articles of Association, with the authorised capital increased to EUR 543,033.57, were registered with the Register of Legal Entities; (ii) Nasdaq CSD SE (the securities depository) registered 10,294,119 new shares with a total issue price of EUR 7,000,000.92 issued upon the increase of the authorised capital (hereinafter - the New Shares), and (iii) the Board of AB Nasdaq Vilniu

title: Užbaigtas AB „Novaturas“ įstatinio kapitalo didinimas, įregistruoti nauji įstatai, registruotos ir į prekybą AB Nasdaq Vilnius įtrauktos naujos akcijos
description: AB „Novaturas“ (toliau – Bendrovė) informuoja, kad 2026 m. liepos 21 d. (i) juridinių asmenų registre įregistruoti pakeisti Bendrovės įstatai su iki 543 033,57 EUR padidintu įstatiniu kapitalu; (ii) Nasdaq CSD SE (vertybinių popierių depozitoriumas) įregistravo įstatinio kapitalo metu išleistus 10 294 119 vnt. naujų akcijų, kurių bendra emisijos kaina 7 000 000,92 EUR  (toliau – Naujos akcijos); o (iii) AB Nasdaq Vilnius valdyba priėmė sprendimą įtraukti Naujas akcijas į preky

title: Investeringsforeningen Jyske Invest har ajourført prospekt
description: Prospektet for Investeringsforeningen Jyske Invest er opdateret.

title: Sodexo selected by Clariant to deliver global integrated workplace services
description: Sodexo announces today a new five-year global partnership with Clariant, one of the world’s leading speciality chemical companies. The agreement includes a wide range of soft and hard FM services from cleaning, to building, grounds maintenance and technical support. The scope covers more than 50 sites in 13 countries across key markets in Europe, Americas and Asia Pacific.

title: Sodexo retenu pour gérer l’ensemble des sites de Clariant dans le monde
description: Sodexo annonce aujourd’hui un nouveau partenariat mondial d’une durée de cinq ans avec Clariant, l’un des leaders mondiaux de la chimie de spécialités. L’accord couvre un large éventail de services de soft et de hard FM, allant du nettoyage à la maintenance des bâtiments et des espaces extérieurs, ainsi qu’au support technique. Son périmètre couvre plus de 50 sites dans 13 pays, sur des marchés clés en Europe, sur le continent américain et en Asie-Pacifique.

description: The Iran war has cost the DoD $37.5 billion to date, Hegseth told senators Tuesday, as he requested $67.1 billion more in emergency funding.

title: New British prime minister gains early defense win with Canada fighter jet tie-up
description: Canada has joined the GCAP fighter program as an observer, marking the first expansion beyond the founding members Britain, Italy and Japan.

title: Iran warns Bulgaria against aiding US military operations
description: Iran’s foreign ministry spokesman warned Bulgaria on Tuesday against allowing the U.S. to use its territory for military operations against Iran.

title: Boeing on track for 2028 Air Force One delivery, costs rise
description: Boeing remains on track to deliver two new Air Force One jets in 2028, but meeting that target will require additional spending.

title: Hanwha Philly Shipyard awarded $2 billion to build 2 missile-tracking vessels
description: The Hanwha Philly Shipyard was awarded $2 billion to build the missile-tracking vessels set to replace the aging Pacific Tracker and Pacific Collector.

title: Germany to study French cooperation offer on SAMP/T air-defense system
description: German government leaders will study an offer by French President Emmanuel Macron to cooperate on the French-Italian SAMP/T air defense system.

title: How startups are reshaping the Pentagon’s drone industry
description: Experts say the Drone Dominance competition reflects a broader shift in how the Pentagon acquires military technology and cultivates defense startups.

title: Pentagon identifies soldier killed in controlled detonation of Iranian drone
description: Sgt. Michael Emmanuel Swinton, 30, was killed Saturday during the controlled detonation of unexploded ordnance from a downed Iranian one-way attack drone.

title: Russia may use captured Ukrainian drones against Poland and Baltics, Warsaw warns
description: Russia has captured a large number of Ukrainian drones and may be planning to use them against NATO or to stage a false flag attack, Polish officials said.

title: US Marine Corps turns to AI-powered Bullfrog as drone threats expand
description: Allen Control Systems announced Monday that the Marine Corps has chosen the Bullfrog autonomous weapon system to integrate into its airborne defenses.

title: X-Bow out to tackle cost quandary with sub-$100,000 drone interceptor
description: X-Bow Systems is launching what it hopes will be a remedy to the ongoing conundrum of combating cheap drones with multimillion dollar interceptors.

title: From depot to detonation: The case for a unified logistics picture
description: "We have the technology for that comprehensive, near real-time common operating picture (COP), we just need to link it," writes LMI's Robert Yon.

title: New executive order tightens defense supply chain waiver rules
description: A new executive order aims to make it harder for U.S. defense contractors to buy critical minerals and other materials from prohibited foreign suppliers.

title: US Air Force begins piloted flights, autonomy tests for modified F-16s
description: Piloted flights and autonomy tests began recently for modified F-16s that allows artificial intelligence agents to fly the aircraft.

title: Doodle Labs eyes US, European production sites as demand soars for jam-resistant drones
description: Doodle Labs hopes to turn its success in equipping jam-hardened drones in Ukraine into additional production sites in Europe and he United States.

title: Pentagon identifies American soldiers killed in Iranian attack in Jordan
description: 1st Lt. Tyler James Feehan, 25, and Pvt. Isabella Gonzales, 19, were killed in action in an Iranian ballistic missile and drone attack in Jordan.

title: New Air Force One to get ‘maxed out’ upgrades after security questions
description: The Qatari-donated Air Force One will be sent away for "maxed out" upgrades, Trump said Sunday in response to questions about security gaps.

title: Lockheed Martin’s Morfius X-Rotor built to fry 50 enemy drones in one flight
description: Lockheed Martin is rolling out the Morfius X-Rotor, a recoverable counter-drone system the company says can kill 50 enemy drones in one flight.

title: Lockheed Martin announces cheaper Patriot interceptor missile
description: Lockheed Martin introduced a cheaper Patriot interceptor as the U.S. and partner nations grapple with the exorbitant costs of shooting down cheap drones.

title: Thunderstruck: Anduril unveils autonomous attack rotorcraft
description: Anduril's autonomous attack rotorcraft, dubbed Thunder, is designed to operate with current and next-generation crewed attack helicopter platforms.

title: Israel’s IAI unveils ‘Hypnosis’ system for confusing enemy drone swarms
description: The system, called Hypnosis, consists of an array of mobile “stations” around a defended area that send out jamming signals against drone swarms.

title: Trust between operators, CCAs starts with simulations: Former Air Force secretary
description: Simulations and exercises will be key to boosting trust between operators and CCAs, according to former U.S. Air Force secretary Frank Kendall.

title: As fighter pilots prepare to command drone wingmen, BAE bets on new helmet tech
description: BAE Systems unveiled new helmet display technology designed to enable fighter pilots to be one-person command centers.

title: US Air Force seeking air defense missile system to protect air bases
description: The U.S. Air Force has put out a request for a new air defense missile system to defend the service’s installations against cruise missiles and drones.

title: US service member killed in northern Iraq, US Central Command says
description: A U.S. service member was killed on Saturday “during a controlled detonation of unexploded ordnance” in northern Iraq, CENTCOM confirmed.

description: United Launch Alliance sent another batch of Amazon Leo satellites into orbit today. Except for six rockets under contract to Boeing for Starliner missions, it was the last launch of […]

title: Agios scraps sickle cell drug
description: The study failure costs Agios a chance to one-up Novo Nordisk and represents yet another setback in a disease that’s frustrated drugmakers of late.

title: Novo sues Lilly, alleging ‘misleading’ advertising of obesity drugs
description: The lawsuit follows a cease-and-desist request and argues Lilly is using “deceptive” ads to claim its GLP-1 products are broadly superior to Novo’s medicines. Lilly countered that its campaign is “truthful.”

title: Novartis climbs on upbeat drug sales as key readouts loom
description: A return to quarterly sales growth boosted shares higher on Tuesday, though a handful of coming study results will have a bigger impact on the company’s long-term outlook.

title: Tempus to acquire cancer test maker Personalis for $1.5B
description: Tempus AI’s planned acquisition follows recent interest in blood-based cancer tests across the medtech industry.

title: Pain drugmaker Latigo outlines plans to go public
description: The Westlake-founded company specializes in non-opioid drugs that target sodium ion channels, and is now adding to what’s already been a busy month for the biotech IPO queue.

title: Bristol Myers to build ‘powerful’ AI factory; Samsung Biologics bids for peptide maker
description: Bristol Myers is the third pharmaceutical company to recently seek Nvidia’s help building a large AI data center. Elsewhere, a Novartis kidney drug gained a leg up on competitors.

title: [Podcast] From Protocol to Patient: Inside Clinical Supply with Almac Clinical Services
description: This podcast explores how clinical trial supplies move from early planning to global delivery, ensuring investigational medicines reach patients safely and on time.

title: Jasper gets a lifeline in merger with immune drugmaker Kira
description: The acquisition, which involves a concurrent licensing deal with startup Mirador, gives Jasper a chance to rebound from setbacks that have wiped out most of its market value.

title: Arbutus, Sanofi escalate mRNA patent fights; InnoCare’s TYK2 contender advances
description: The new lawsuits add to a web of legal disputes over technology involved in COVID vaccines. Elsewhere, a prolific AI biotech inked another deal and Insmed strengthened support for a closely watched blood pressure drug.

title: Compounders maintain a firm grip on the GLP-1 market
description: Despite an FDA crackdown, numerous pharma lawsuits and possible safety risks, nearly 1 in 5 patients are still taking cheaper weight-loss alternatives.

description:
The House voted 220-205 Tuesday evening to pass a stopgap continuing resolution that would fund the federal government through Dec. 4.
